examples: The Zairean army may melt before the rebels, but Mr Kabila still faces two other armies: one Rwandan, one Angolan.
The first handover of money in Mr de Villepin's presence occurred in 1995, he said, involving 10m francs from the then Zairean President Mobutu Sese Seko.
One movement, the Mai Mai, is made up of local ethnic groups and links up with former Rwandan soldiers, former Zairean army soldiers and some Burundian Hutus.
